rationale: Bijmolt et al. is cited not only in a broad introductory list, but also in the citing paper's explicit positioning of related work on price-elasticity generalizations. The authors state their study is related to prior meta-analyses (including Bijmolt et al.) and explain how their approach differs. They also use Bijmolt's meta-analysis as a benchmark in their results/appendix by comparing their elasticity estimates to studies included there. This indicates a meaningful framing and empirical benchmarking role, not just a passing mention.
relation_description: The citing paper treats Bijmolt et al. (2005) as a key prior empirical-generalization reference in the price-elasticity literature and positions its contribution relative to that baseline. It also uses the study set summarized in Bijmolt et al. to benchmark whether its own elasticity estimates are consistent with prior evidence.
